Legal Aid Services

Free legal assistance to ensure justice is accessible to all survivors of torture and human rights violations.

What We Offer

Free legal consultation and advice
Court representation for survivors
Documentation of torture and violations
Assistance with police complaints
Support for reparations claims
Legal aid for vulnerable populations

Need legal assistance? Contact us today for a confidential consultation.
